title: confiture migrate verify --format json
description: Runtime-correctness verification of applied migrations via .verify.sql sidecars (VerifyAllResult.to_dict). The fraisier migration adapter reads failed_count (ok ⇔ failed_count == 0) and each results[].{version,name,status,error}. A migration with no .verify.sql is reported with status "no_file" and counted in skipped_count, not failed_count. A crash (config/DB error) emits the error envelope (error-envelope.schema.json) instead of this shape.

verified_count.description: Number of applied migrations whose .verify.sql passed.

failed_count.description: Number of applied migrations whose .verify.sql failed. The adapter treats the run as ok when this is 0.

skipped_count.description: Number of applied migrations with no .verify.sql sidecar (status "no_file").

name.description: Migration name (may equal the version when no name was recorded).

status.description: Outcome: "verified", "failed", or "no_file" (no sidecar). The adapter treats anything other than "failed" as ok.

actual_value.description: First column of the first row the .verify.sql query returned; null when no file or no row.

verify_file.description: Path to the .verify.sql sidecar; null when none.

error.description: Failure detail when status is "failed"; null otherwise.
